content.text: Now let me look at the standardize.ts to understand table handling in standardization

Now I can see the `standardizeElements` function handles table unwrapping (single-column layout tables), and `isLikelyContent` in scoring considers elements with tables as likely content. Let me look at the `removeEmptyElements` function more closely and understand the flow. The fix should be in `standardizeElements` or in a dedicated removal step. Let me look at how the single-column table unwrapping works and where a table with no text content would survive.
